text.tspan: [Booking has child tickets linked to parent account]

svg.text: POST /webhooks/patch/contact-updated (parent loyalty incremented by child stamps)
Log failed webhook event only (no retry)
Save one-time free-pass code as available
Save one-time free-pass code from PATCH custom field
Apply counter reset rule (if enabled by park policy)
Update booking state and loyalty state
Return updated booking and loyalty status
Update booking state and loyalty state
Return updated booking and loyalty status
Use free pass code at checkout
